Since changing phones it won't let me log into the app. It says it sends an email but I don't receive one. I've tried so many things to make it work and it won't. I messaged the company too and haven't heard back.
straight up selling overpriced garbage with no shame
Just one day decided to stop letting me log in, all the points I had will expire and there's no way to access any of it. I guess it's a good excuse to stop eating food at McDonald's at least.
it's great food and awesome customer service 👌

They make it impossible to refund your points on a canceled order. whats the point in collecting and using them when the point won't be given back when its the restaurants fault for not delivering. why do I have to submit a 20 page form for this?

app has stopped working, can't redeem points, can't even make an order. tried changing my store but it keeps saying I have an order in progress and I can't change anything till the order is finished. then when I tap on "view current order" the page reloads and nothing shows up. this app has become a menu board and nothing more. ridiculous for a billion dollar company
exceptional service 👏 will come back over and over again

I didn't even get to the issues other people are having cause it demands your postal code, poorly sorts menu items so it's harder to find the meal I want and their false 24 hour advertising just to mess with people who don't have a car makes it not even worth getting to the problems other people are having to order right outside the open door that stops at the pickup counter so they might as well let people come in to order and skip this bs. I went to the open tim hortons next door instead.

Haven't been able to pay since the last update. It says " Problem with Payment Sorry we cannot process your order right now. Your card is not charged. Please contact crew at the store to proceed." I've contacted the store and they aren't able to do anything. Mcdonald's Please fix the app issue.
the app is junk/trash... the outlet dont get any notification abt ur order...
Just ok. Needs improvement though
I can't login, when entering my email in the login screen, it tells me it already exists and to try again.... but I'm already in the login screen...

never works
App sucks. Slow and customer support is bugged out - so if something's wrong with your order you're just screwed.
most unfriendly thing I have ever used. Nothing is explained.

This app offers delivery when it literally doesn't exist in my area at the time, leaving me with no explanation after 20minutes of no progress on the app only to cancel the whole thing. In addition to this, the user interface sucks when I want to try and use a deal that is claimed to be offered.
just wanted ice cream at 1am and it took like 15 minutes to set up a damn account McDonald's please I just want ice cream.

The app claims to provide codes for collecting points. However: a) the points codes are very inconsistent. They used to work about 50% of the time for me, lately it's zero times in the last 10. b) there is No Way to refresh or ask the app for a new code once the first one fails. c) there is no way to choose the proper location for the code if/when it detects the wrong one d) the app Claims that you can use your receipt to get points when the code fails, but it declines if more than once a month.
wont let you login on your android phones. was working all good on my Apple devices.

July 1st 2026 update: THIS IS STILL A PROBLEM. Had an order delivered on August 27th and my app shows it's still in progress so I can't order or access my points for pick up or delivery. I've un-installed and installed 3 times...not fixed.

absolutely horrible app. I sent through an order for pickup at my local restaurant. I got the confirmation email and my bank account was charged. When I showed up to grab the food the restaurant told me they couldn't give me my food as the order never went through. they refused to process a refund and told me to call customer service. when I called their customer service line I was told that they do not process refunds, but they can give me points on my account instead. Robbery.
worst app I have ever used. convoluted and not easy to navigate. went to a McDonald's to try it out. even staff were clueless about it.
still junk. uninstalled will try again some day

This app is GARBAGE. Orders in the app are failing to appear at the actual McDonald's restaurants. you would never know unless you called the restaurant themself or get in contact with customer service. Customer service says the best they can do is refund the order but why does your app not update if it reaches the store. Check your design team and tell me how that makes sense in a UI/UX flow logic? Not flagging an order as "failed to delivered" to the actual McDonald's location? 0/5 rating.

constant glitches and problems. today for example it says my address doesn't qualify for delivery when I've done delivery for ages. edit to add: has not worked in days. deals suck. the place I go to sucks, always dirty and misses something EVERY single TIME..

Awful. Tried to sign in, prompted email sign in. Clicked the link, won't sign in, can't use my account. Absolute waste of time. Edit: Had to open the link to the app in a new tab for it to work. this app used to be great but half the time it just doesn't work anymore. I will change my review when it gets fixed.

Update on June 24, 2026: Too many steps required to do simple tasks. The app also doesn't make it easy to see if an order has been placed or if more info is needed. Very frustrating!

has to be among the worst made apps out there. takes way too long to load, a constant reminder not to drive while using it, well duh. it's been helpful though in other ways. I no longer eat your so-called food.

Hilarious incompetence. New phone, I tap the login link and get Login or Sign Up. I have an existing account so I enter my e-mail address. The app responds "Account already exists. Please try again." No kidding, that's the one I'm trying to log into! But the app only goes down the new-user route (despite the Login *or* Sign Up message). No other way to try and log in, so bye-bye points!
buggy as f
unable to use app. would not allow me to put in location
Navigating the app is frustrating. Always being asked for add ons on every order. Options and notes don't make any sense. My wife had made the order at the counter before the app was loaded.
app fails to start often, been charged for food I didn't order. I've also had difficulty paying online. updates have made it worse. I gave it 5 stars previously but had to delete that one.

Please add a "reset code" option. It has happened often enough that it ruins the app experience. It gives me a code, it doesn't work, but keeps giving me the same code. The only way to fix it is by restarting my phone twice. It's just stupid.

Would be great if it supports "approximate location services" as introduced in Android 12 rather than persisting on requesting user's precise location. The app doesn't need to know where exactly I am, just which area I'm in, in order to find a McD location near me. slow
again this app is so broken it never places an order I always have to reinstall it to get the order placement to work... missing the breakfast window again thanks to your app being buggy as usual.

The app takes forever to get to order screen with all the pop ups saying don’t text and drive, try this and that. Put all the special things in the order screen. I hate waiting for 5 minutes at the order screen to give the code. Fix it please so it’s useable without making people crazy

While McDonald’s is a Fast Food chain their app just run the slowest on Earth. Whenever there is a promotion they just force u to load that ad first. While it takes forever to load that ad it actually asks u to click “Maybe Later” if you aren’t even slightly interested in ordering any of their special promotions, which slows u down even more. Not to mention it almost takes like a minute to load their automated QR everytime. Average time for me to order a meal on myself usually takes less than a minute but every time I almost have to spend 5 minutes just to get that stupid app working. 10 minutes if the app decide they are not in the mood for the day.

Where to start? Opening time is abysmally long. App is laggy in general. Tons of slow unnecessary animations bloating everything up. Promotion pop up takes forever to exit out of and sometimes requires multiple clicks. Constantly signs me out for no reason. I have given up using this app, the “coupons” are rarely ever that good anyways. 

If you are trying to get users to stop trying to use the app for whatever reason (maybe to save costs or reduce coupon / points usage), you’re doing a great job. 

EMBARASSING work from developers for a company of this size.

Everything just loads forever and never works, I’ve restarted my phone, connected to a different network, reinstalled and everything. It used to work flawlessly, I don’t know what they did to make it stop working entirely.

One of the worst apps I’ve ever used. It’s been consistently horrible for the multiple years I’ve had it. Its lags so badly it takes over a minute to get through to my rewards code.
